ocr.text: In assessing the current trends in fleet utilization and voyage charter revenue, it is crucial to consider the performance metrics of
Evergreen Marine over the past five years.

The data highlights a significant focus on various vessel categories including Bulk Carriers, Container Ships, Tankers, and
General Cargo. Notably, the Bulk Carriers segment achieved a revenue of £8,500, reflecting a robust demand for this category.
In contrast, the Container Ships category is anticipated to experience a Forecast Change, indicative of shifting market dynamics.
As we move forward, it is imperative to address the operating costs which have shown a gradual increase, with Q32023's
Operating Costs recorded at £100M, rising to £120M in Q12024. This upward trend in costs is juxtaposed with a noteworthy
Revenue Growth of £35M in Q22023 and a reported £45M in Q42023, underscoring the need for strategic adjustments.
Additionally, the tanker segment is projected to see a 2.5% Increase in utilization, contributing positively to the overall fleet
performance.

It is essential to note that the overall fleet has seen a 40% utilization rate, with an anticipated operational framework extending
over 7 Years, which will help in optimizing both vessel days and total revenue.
